name: Mumble
description: Mumble is an open-source, encrypted, low-latency voice chat server for communities, gaming, and teams.

notes.text: The generated SuperUser password is displayed once during installation. Reset it later with: mumble-server -ini /etc/mumble/mumble-server.ini -supw <password>
Allow both TCP and UDP traffic on port 64738 through any firewall or router.
The Ice administration endpoint is restricted to localhost and protected with a generated secret.
